name: Cash Rewards Secured Credit Card
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, but requires a refundable $200–$5,000 security deposit to set your limit

verdict.text: Same 6%/2% category structure as the unsecured Customized Cash Rewards — a strong pick for rebuilding credit if you can front the deposit

earn_rates.category: Choice category (1st year) — gas/EV, online shopping, dining, travel, drug stores, or home improvement

earn_note: Identical earn structure to the unsecured Customized Cash Rewards, including the shared $2,500/quarter combined cap on the choice category and grocery/wholesale-club 2%. One notable gap: secured card products are not eligible for the BofA Rewards relationship bonus that boosts the unsecured card's rates by 10–75%.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a Bank of America checking or savings account

points.note: Same redemption menu and category math as the unsecured card — max out the $2,500/quarter choice-category cap for the best blended rate.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency — straight cash back, not a points program.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: No purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide published specifically for this card.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card.

services.name: Deposit review for return
services.detail: Bank of America periodically reviews your account and, based on credit history, may qualify you to have your deposit returned — not guaranteed for all customers.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)
Their activity is reported to the credit bureaus too, on the same account

additional_cards.note: Free to add — since this account reports to the credit bureaus, an authorized user benefits from the payment history alongside the primary cardholder.
